descriptions.description: The 10ml plastic bottle suits sample and travel sizes for lotion, serum, and personal care. Lightweight and cost-effective, it works for promotional packaging and trial formats. Clear plastic shows product color and level.

A 30ml plastic bottle with a 13-415 neck for lotion, serum, and personal care formats. Skincare and personal care brands choose this for travel and trial sizes. A practical option when weight and cost are priorities.
